message.content:
{
  "assessment_framework": {
    "marks_distribution": [
      "Section A: Reading Skills - 20 Marks",
      "Section B: Writing Skills and Grammar - 20 Marks",
      "Section C: Language through Literature - 40 Marks",
      "Internal Assessment (Listening & Speaking) - 5 Marks"
    ],
    "question_paper_design": [
      "Reading Comprehension: Discursive passage (400-450 words, 10 marks) and Case-based factual passage with visual input (200-250 words, 10 marks)",
      "Grammar: Determiners, Tenses, Modals, Subject-verb concord, Reported speech (Gap Filling/Editing/Transformation, 10 marks)",
      "Writing Skills: Descriptive Paragraph (100-120 words, 5 marks) and Story/Diary Entry (100-120 words, 5 marks)",
      "Reference to Context: Extracts from Drama/Prose (5+5 marks) and Poetry (5+5 marks)",
      "Short Answer Questions: Beehive (4x3=12 marks) and Moments (3x2=6 marks)",
      "Long Answer Questions: Beehive (6 marks) and Moments (6 marks)"
    ],
    "competency_weightage": [
      "Reading Comprehension: Conceptual understanding, decoding, analyzing, inferring, interpreting, vocabulary",
      "Writing Skills & Grammar: Creative expression, reasoning, justifying, appropriate style/tone, format, fluency, accuracy",
      "Language through Literature: Recalling, reasoning, appreciating, applying literary conventions, identifying themes/messages"
    ],
    "bloom_levels": [
      "Comprehension",
      "Interpretation",
      "Analysis",
      "Inference",
      "Evaluation",
      "Appreciation",
      "Recalling",
      "Reasoning",
      "Creative Expression"
    ],
    "internal_assessment": [
      "Listening and Speaking Skills: 5 Marks",
      "Regular practice recommended",
      "Art-integrated projects (Role Play, Skit, Dramatization)"
    ],
    "practical_assessment": [
      "Listening and Speaking activities assessed internally",
      "Guidelines refer to Circular no. Acad-33/2020"
    ],
    "project_assessment": [
      "Art-integrated projects based on Role Play, Skit, Dramatization"
    ]
  }
}
